# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent {
        label 'master'
    }
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                // Build your project here (e.g., using Maven, Gradle, etc.)
                sh 'mvn clean install'
            }
        }
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                // Run tests (e.g., using JUnit, TestNG, etc.)
                sh 'mvn test'
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                branch 'master'
            }
            steps {
                // Deploy to production
                sh 'ssh user@server "cd /path/to/project; git pull origin master; mvn deploy'
            }
        }
    }
}
